Bringing you the story of Laura & Josh...
Storyof

Laura & Josh

Ten Years of Choosing Each Other

Watch the Film
Frames from the Film
Their Journey

The Story

Josh and Laura have spent ten years building a life that looks from the outside, like a series of climbs. New cities. New setbacks. New animals to name after weather. Thunder was Josh's dog, Lluvia was Laura's — rain, in her language, and felt like a sign. Then Rayo the fearless cat. The Then River. Storm Family, they called them.

This film is the knot in the rope. The fixed point. Ten years in.

The Journey

Ten Years

How They Met
A Shot in the Dark

One last message before quitting the app. A sea lion photo, a dog named Thunder, and married five months later.

Year 1
All the Way Down, All the Way Up

Job loss, silver coins for an immigration lawyer. By December — the best financial year of his life.

Year 2
Colombia

Josh met Laura's mother and Lluvia — her dog since she was nine. Then Lluvia was gone. First apartment together.

Year 3
Thunder, Rain & Lightning

A fearless kitten named Rayo — Lightning. Thunder, Rain, and Lightning. The storm family was complete.

Year 4
Roots

First house — imperfect, but theirs. River arrived to learn from Thunder while there was still time.

Year 5
The World Stopped

COVID. Laura barely made it back on one of the last flights home.

Year 6
The Dream House

Dream house from an eighty-year-old widow. Laura became a citizen. Then Thunder laid down and couldn't get up.

Year 7
Six out of Seven

Six of seven exam sections passed. All seven required. A car accident. A tumor. They moved to Reno.

Year 8
One Attempt Left

Failed again. One try left. A specialist looked once and said: “This is why you have failed.”

Year 9
Doctor

She passed. First job as a licensed vet. Made for emergency medicine. Moved to Texas. First trip to Europe.

Year 10
Drawn to Life

ER veterinarian. Dr. Anthony gone, after years of bonus time. Vow renewal in Puerto Rico with the people they built a life beside.

Moments

Their World

Behind the Story

Voices & Moments

Interviews, archive footage, and excerpts from the film

The Last Message

How a buried Tinder match became a marriage in five months
